items.title: Obi Toppin was the last vet playing for the Pacers this year. He averaged 14 points per game in the final month without most of his 2024-25 teammates available. And he re-captured his bounce: www.circlecityspin.com/debrief-obi-...
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Obi Toppin was the last vet playing for the Pacers this year. He averaged 14 points per game in the final month without most of his 2024-25 teammates available. And he re-captured his bounce: www.circlecityspin.com/debrief-obi-...

items.title: Obi Toppin thinks a between-the-legs dunk is easy, even after missing four months with a foot injury. That he can say that with a straight face said so much about his season: www.circlecityspin.com/debrief-obi-...
items.author: Tony East
